WKSH.potions.title: ⚗️ Crafting — Potions & Talismans
WKSH.potions.intro: Artisan: {name} — alchemy draws on the Force (+1 Force die on the check). Final Encumbrance 0.
WKSH.potions.symb:
Spending symbols — alchemy draws on the Force {force} ({light}/{dark} generate Advantage/Threat):
{suc} each net Success: −2 h of brewing time (min. 1 h) · {adv}: beneficial effect · {adv}{adv}: duration / thrift · {adv}{adv}{adv}: batch / potency · {tri} or 4 {adv}: formula learned · {thr}{des}: complication.
WKSH.potions.res.title: ⚗️ Resolution — {name}
WKSH.potions.res.fail: ❌ Failure — the crafting attempt fails (ingredients wasted).
WKSH.potions.item.madeBy: Crafted by {name} ({skill}). Time: {time} h · Materials: {cost} cr.
WKSH.potions.item.triumphLeft: ★ Unspent Triumph — major narrative effect of the GM's choice.
WKSH.potions.rec.poison.eff: Inflicts a poison: the target makes a Resilience check or suffers wound damage.
WKSH.potions.rec.stimulant.eff: Removes 1 Critical Injury or +1 rank to a characteristic for 5 rounds.
WKSH.potions.rec.fearFetish.eff: Forces a Fear check on nearby enemies.
WKSH.potions.rec.fireBrew.eff: The next Engaged-range attack gains Burn 2.
WKSH.potions.rec.vigorElixir.eff: Recovers all strain; grants immunity to Fear for 1 encounter.
WKSH.potions.rec.weakPotion.eff: The target suffers −1 rank to one characteristic (Resilience to resist).
WKSH.potions.rec.destinyTalisman.eff: 1×/session: reroll one check or flip a Destiny Point.
WKSH.potions.rec.powerAmulet.eff: +1 Force die to one chosen power while worn.
WKSH.potions.rec.willPotion.eff: Dominates a target's will (Discipline to resist).
WKSH.potions.rec.healAccel.eff: Doubles the wearer's natural healing rate.
WKSH.potions.rec.neuralCharm.eff: Clouds the mind: +2 Setback to social checks against the wearer.
WKSH.potions.rec.shieldAmulet.eff: Absorbs the first Critical Injury of the encounter.
WKSH.potions.rec.lifeWater.eff: Revives or stabilizes a dying character; major narrative effects.
WKSH.potions.rec.resistSymbol.eff: +2 Soak and immunity to one energy type for 1 encounter.
WKSH.potions.spend.boon.label: Enhanced beneficial effect
WKSH.potions.spend.dur.label: Extended duration
WKSH.potions.spend.dur.desc: +1 h of effect, or +1 round in combat
WKSH.potions.spend.thrift.label: Thrift
WKSH.potions.spend.batch.label: Batch
WKSH.potions.spend.potent.label: Potency
WKSH.potions.spend.virul.label: Virulence / Amplification
WKSH.potions.spend.formula.label: Formula learned
WKSH.potions.spend.formula.desc: −1 difficulty on future attempts to craft this recipe (★ or 4 ⬆)
